runParameters.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (baseline/comparison divisors fixed to 1.0).

workload.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides; Fawn uses deferred queue sync to avoid per-command wait inflation at tiny payload size while preserving per-upload timing normalization.
workload.description: Single upload command used to align with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1KB.
workload.name: buffer-upload 1KB
